name: Dark Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine warm water and maple syrup; sprinkle on yeast; set aside to rest.
2. In a bowl, whisk together eggs, molasses, and instant coffee.
3. Add carob powder and half of the flour mixture (whole wheat pastry flour and rye flour); beat until smooth.
4. Using a wooden spoon, stir in corn meal; mix thoroughly.
5. Gradually add remaining flour, stirring with a wooden spoon until a dough forms.
6. Turn dough onto a floured work surface and knead for 15 minutes.
7. Place dough into a lightly oiled bowl; turn to coat the top with oil. Cover with a towel and let rise for 1 hour.
8. Remove dough from the bowl, punch down, and knead for an additional 3 minutes.
9. Shape dough into round loaves and place on lightly oiled cookie sheets.
10. Brush loaves with egg and water mixture.
11. Let rise again for 1 hour; bake at 350°F (175°C) for 30-40 minutes or until a thunking sound is produced when tapped with a knuckle.
